title: View as Other user

posts.author: inny12 (Jacob Inerfield)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

The ability to view a board as a different user. E.g. as a guest, or someone below the level of the user.

If I invite a guest in to a board, I would like to see how it looks for them and ensure they have the right permissions and access to the correct information.

Currently I have to create a non-work email address (which my company do not like), invite myself in as a guest, and then test.

What are you trying to achieve

See how people view/ interact with boards from within the users account.
